entries.en-US:
---
name: instinct-import
description: Import instincts from file or URL into project/global scope
command: true
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: instinct-import
description: 从文件或URL导入本能到项目/全局范围
command: true
---

entries.en-US: Run the instinct CLI using the plugin root path:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用插件根路径运行本能 CLI：

entries.en-US: Or if `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is not set (manual installation):
entries.zh-Hans: 或者如果 `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` 未设置（手动安装）：

entries.en-US: Import instincts from local file paths or HTTP(S) URLs.
entries.zh-Hans: 从本地文件路径或 HTTP(S) URL 导入本能。

entries.en-US:
1. Fetch the instinct file (local path or URL)
2. Parse and validate the format
3. Check for duplicates with existing instincts
4. Merge or add new instincts
5. Save to inherited instincts directory:
   - Project scope: `~/.claude/homunculus/projects/<project-id>/instincts/inherited/`
   - Global scope: `~/.claude/homunculus/instincts/inherited/`
entries.zh-Hans:
1. 获取本能文件（本地路径或 URL）
2. 解析并验证格式
3. 检查与现有本能是否重复
4. 合并或添加新本能
5. 保存到继承的本能目录：
   * 项目范围：`~/.claude/homunculus/projects/<project-id>/instincts/inherited/`
   * 全局范围：`~/.claude/homunculus/instincts/inherited/`

entries.en-US:
```
 Importing instincts from: team-instincts.yaml
================================================

Found 12 instincts to import.

Analyzing conflicts...

## New Instincts (8)
These will be added:
  ✓ use-zod-validation (confidence: 0.7)
  ✓ prefer-named-exports (confidence: 0.65)
  ✓ test-async-functions (confidence: 0.8)
  ...

## Duplicate Instincts (3)
Already have similar instincts:
  WARNING: prefer-functional-style
     Local: 0.8 confidence, 12 observations
     Import: 0.7 confidence
     → Keep local (higher confidence)

  WARNING: test-first-workflow
     Local: 0.75 confidence
     Import: 0.9 confidence
     → Update to import (higher confidence)

Import 8 new, update 1?
```

```
 Importing instincts from: team-instincts.yaml
================================================

Found 12 instincts to import.

Analyzing conflicts...

## New Instincts (8)
These will be added:
  ✓ use-zod-validation (confidence: 0.7)
  ✓ prefer-named-exports (confidence: 0.65)
  ✓ test-async-functions (confidence: 0.8)
  ...

## Duplicate Instincts (3)
Already have similar instincts:
  WARNING: prefer-functional-style
     Local: 0.8 confidence, 12 observations

  WARNING: test-first-workflow
     Local: 0.75 confidence
     Import: 0.9 confidence

Import 8 new, update 1?
```

entries.en-US: When importing an instinct with an existing ID:
entries.zh-Hans: 当导入一个已存在 ID 的本能时：

entries.en-US:
- Higher-confidence import becomes an update candidate
- Equal/lower-confidence import is skipped
- User confirms unless `--force` is used
entries.zh-Hans:
* 置信度更高的导入会成为更新候选
* 置信度相等或更低的导入会被跳过
* 除非使用 `--force`，否则需要用户确认
导入的本能会被标记为：

entries.en-US:
```yaml
source: inherited
scope: project
imported_from: "team-instincts.yaml"
project_id: "a1b2c3d4e5f6"
project_name: "my-project"
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```yaml
source: inherited
scope: project
imported_from: "team-instincts.yaml"
project_id: "a1b2c3d4e5f6"
project_name: "my-project"
```

entries.en-US:
- `--dry-run`: Preview without importing
- `--force`: Skip confirmation prompt
- `--min-confidence <n>`: Only import instincts above threshold
- `--scope <project|global>`: Select target scope (default: `project`)
entries.zh-Hans:
* `--dry-run`：预览而不导入
* `--force`：跳过确认提示
* `--min-confidence <n>`：仅导入高于阈值的本能
* `--scope <project|global>`：选择目标范围（默认：`project`）

entries.en-US:
```
PASS: Import complete!

Added: 8 instincts
Updated: 1 instinct
Skipped: 3 instincts (equal/higher confidence already exists)

New instincts saved to: ~/.claude/homunculus/instincts/inherited/

Run /instinct-status to see all instincts.
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```
PASS: 导入完成！

已添加：8 个本能
已更新：1 个本能
已跳过：3 个本能（已存在同等或更高置信度的版本）

新本能已保存至：~/.claude/homunculus/instincts/inherited/

运行 /instinct-status 以查看所有本能。
```
